ogTitle: Dilston vs Doctors Rocks: Climate Safety

heading: Dilston vs Doctors Rocks — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Dilston, Tasmania and Doctors Rocks, Tasmania. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Dilston has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Doctors Rocks (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Dilston or Doctors Rocks safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Dilston has a flood risk score of 52/100, while Doctors Rocks scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Dilston scores 32/100 for bushfire risk. Doctors Rocks scores 59/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Dilston or Doctors Rocks?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Dilston has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.45% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
